# revolut Provider

Manage Revolut Merchant API subscription plans and webhooks.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    revolut = {
      source  = "Sherman-Studio/revolut"
      version = "~> 0.1"
    }
  }
}

provider "revolut" {
  # api_secret_key is read from REVOLUT_API_KEY by default.
  sandbox = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_secret_key` (String, Sensitive) Revolut Merchant API secret key. Falls back to the REVOLUT_API_KEY environment variable. Never stored in state.
- `api_version` (String) Revolut-Api-Version header value (YYYY-MM-DD). Falls back to REVOLUT_API_VERSION, then defaults to 2024-09-01.
- `sandbox` (Boolean) When true, target the sandbox host (sandbox-merchant.revolut.com). Falls back to REVOLUT_SANDBOX. Defaults to false (production).
